activities.name: ScriptToCheckEDWLoadCompleted
activities.description: This script checks if EDW load completed for few FACT, DIM tables which is used in SP_FACT_FIVE9_CALL_ALL_CURRDAY_UPD

scripts.text:
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_Fact_lead') IS NOT NULL  DROP TABLE #T_Fact_lead			;
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_Dim_Customer') IS NOT NULL  DROP TABLE #T_Dim_Customer		;
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_DIM_Product') IS NOT NULL  DROP TABLE #T_DIM_Product			;
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_Dim_LeadSubsource') IS NOT NULL  DROP TABLE #T_Dim_LeadSubsource	;
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_Dim_Disposition') IS NOT NULL  DROP TABLE #T_Dim_Disposition		;
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_Dim_Branch') IS NOT NULL  DROP TABLE #T_Dim_Branch			;
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_Dim_CallResult') IS NOT NULL  DROP TABLE #T_Dim_CallResult 		;



With ODS AS
(
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'FHI' as Division FROM ODS.LP_FHI_lds_leads Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'RTW' as Division FROM ODS.LP_RTW_lds_leads Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'PBC' as Division FROM ODS.LP_PBC_lds_leads Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'MAC' as Division FROM ODS.LP_MAC_lds_leads Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'MXH' as Division FROM ODS.LP_MXH_lds_leads Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'CTA' as Division FROM ODS.LP_CTA_lds_leads Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'SWR' as Division FROM ODS.LP_SWR_lds_leads 
)
Select Distinct 'FACT_Lead' as Tablename,EDW.Division,ODS_RecordsCount,EDW_RecordsCount,ODS_RecordsCount-EDW_RecordsCount as Diff ,
min(Case when ODS_RecordsCount-EDW_RecordsCount <=500 then 1 else 0 end) as IsEDWLoaded
Into #T_Fact_lead
from
	(Select Division, Count(*) as EDW_RecordsCount from EDW.FACT_Lead Group by Division ) EDW 
	Left join ODS on EDW.Division=ODS.Division 
	Group by EDW.Division,ODS_RecordsCount,EDW_RecordsCount,ODS_RecordsCount-EDW_RecordsCount 
	;
	

	
--**************************Customers
	
With ODS AS
(
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'FHI' as Division FROM ODS.LP_FHI_cst_customers Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'RTW' as Division FROM ODS.LP_RTW_cst_customers Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'PBC' as Division FROM ODS.LP_PBC_cst_customers Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'MAC' as Division FROM ODS.LP_MAC_cst_customers Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'MXH' as Division FROM ODS.LP_MXH_cst_customers Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'CTA' as Division FROM ODS.LP_CTA_cst_customers Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'SWR' as Division FROM ODS.LP_SWR_cst_customers 
)
Select Distinct 'DIM_Customer' as Tablename, min(Case when ODS_RecordsCount-EDW_RecordsCount <=100 then 1 else 0 end) IsEDWLoaded 
Into #T_DIM_Customer
from
	(Select Division, Count(*) as EDW_RecordsCount from EDW.DIM_Customer Group by Division ) EDW 
	Left join ODS on EDW.Division=ODS.Division ;



--**************************Disposition	
	
With ODS AS
(
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'FHI' as Division FROM ODS.LP_FHI_dsp_dispositions Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'RTW' as Division FROM ODS.LP_RTW_dsp_dispositions Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'PBC' as Division FROM ODS.LP_PBC_dsp_dispositions Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'MAC' as Division FROM ODS.LP_MAC_dsp_dispositions Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'MXH' as Division FROM ODS.LP_MXH_dsp_dispositions Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'CTA' as Division FROM ODS.LP_CTA_dsp_dispositions Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'SWR' as Division FROM ODS.LP_SWR_dsp_dispositions 
)
Select Distinct 'DIM_Disposition' as Tablename, min(Case when ODS_RecordsCount-EDW_RecordsCount =0 then 1 else 0 end) IsEDWLoaded 
Into #T_DIM_Disposition
from
	(Select Division, Count(*) as EDW_RecordsCount from EDW.DIM_Disposition Group by Division ) EDW 
	Left join ODS on EDW.Division=ODS.Division ;
	

--**************************Product


With ODS AS
(
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'FHI' as Division FROM ODS.LP_FHI_prd_products Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'RTW' as Division FROM ODS.LP_RTW_prd_products Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'PBC' as Division FROM ODS.LP_PBC_prd_products Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'MAC' as Division FROM ODS.LP_MAC_prd_products Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'MXH' as Division FROM ODS.LP_MXH_prd_products Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'CTA' as Division FROM ODS.LP_CTA_prd_products Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'SWR' as Division FROM ODS.LP_SWR_prd_products 
)
Select Distinct 'DIM_Product' as Tablename, min(Case when ODS_RecordsCount-EDW_RecordsCount =0 then 1 else 0 end) IsEDWLoaded 
Into #T_DIM_Product
from
	(Select  Division, Count(*) as EDW_RecordsCount from EDW.DIM_Product Group by Division ) EDW 
	Left join ODS on EDW.Division=ODS.Division ;
	

--**************************Subsource
	
With ODS AS
(
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'FHI' as Division FROM ODS.LP_FHI_srs_sourcesubs Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'RTW' as Division FROM ODS.LP_RTW_srs_sourcesubs Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'PBC' as Division FROM ODS.LP_PBC_srs_sourcesubs Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'MAC' as Division FROM ODS.LP_MAC_srs_sourcesubs Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'MXH' as Division FROM ODS.LP_MXH_srs_sourcesubs Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'CTA' as Division FROM ODS.LP_CTA_srs_sourcesubs Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'SWR' as Division FROM ODS.LP_SWR_srs_sourcesubs 
)
Select Distinct 'DIM_Lead_sub_source' as Tablename, min(Case when ODS_RecordsCount-EDW_RecordsCount between 0 and 5 then 1 else 0 end) IsEDWLoaded 
Into #T_DIM_LeadSubsource
from
	(Select Division, Count(*) as EDW_RecordsCount from EDW.DIM_Lead_sub_source Group by Division ) EDW 
	Left join ODS on EDW.Division=ODS.Division ;
	

--************************** Callresult
	
With ODS AS
(
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'FHI' as Division FROM ODS.LP_FHI_clr_callresults Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'RTW' as Division FROM ODS.LP_RTW_clr_callresults Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'PBC' as Division FROM ODS.LP_PBC_clr_callresults Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'MAC' as Division FROM ODS.LP_MAC_clr_callresults Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'MXH' as Division FROM ODS.LP_MXH_clr_callresults Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'CTA' as Division FROM ODS.LP_CTA_clr_callresults Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'SWR' as Division FROM ODS.LP_SWR_clr_callresults 
)
Select Distinct 'DIM_Call_Result' as Tablename, min(Case when ODS_RecordsCount-EDW_RecordsCount between 0 and 10 then 1 else 0 end) IsEDWLoaded 
Into #T_DIM_CallResult
from
	(Select Division, Count(*) as EDW_RecordsCount from EDW.DIM_CALL_RESULT Group by Division ) EDW 
	Left join ODS on EDW.Division=ODS.Division ;



--************************** Branch


With ODS AS
(
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'FHI' as Division FROM ODS.LP_FHI_brn_branches Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'RTW' as Division FROM ODS.LP_RTW_brn_branches Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'PBC' as Division FROM ODS.LP_PBC_brn_branches Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'MAC' as Division FROM ODS.LP_MAC_brn_branches Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'MXH' as Division FROM ODS.LP_MXH_brn_branches Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'CTA' as Division FROM ODS.LP_CTA_brn_branches Union all 
SELECT count(*) ODS_RecordsCount, 'SWR' as Division FROM ODS.LP_SWR_brn_branches 
)
Select Distinct 'DIM_Branch' as Tablename, min(Case when ODS_RecordsCount-EDW_RecordsCount =0 then 1 else 0 end) IsEDWLoaded 
Into #T_DIM_Branch
from
	(Select Division, Count(*) as EDW_RecordsCount from EDW.DIM_Branch Group by Division ) EDW 
	Left join ODS on EDW.Division=ODS.Division ;
	



Select min(IsEDWLoaded) as FACT_Lead,  
(Select  IsEDWLoaded from  #T_Dim_Customer) as		Dim_Customer ,
(Select  IsEDWLoaded from  #T_DIM_Product) as		DIM_Product ,
(Select  IsEDWLoaded from  #T_Dim_LeadSubsource) as Dim_LeadSubsource ,
(Select  IsEDWLoaded from  #T_Dim_Disposition) as	Dim_Disposition ,
(Select  IsEDWLoaded from  #T_Dim_Branch) as		Dim_Branch ,
(Select  IsEDWLoaded from  #T_Dim_CallResult) as    Dim_CallResult 
from  #T_Fact_lead ;


Select * from #T_Fact_lead;
